summary: No substantive feedback on audio or performance; reviewer notes incorrect date
review: The sole review merely points out a metadata error with a humorous tone and provides no insight into the concert’s musical or recording quality. It offers no comments on soundboard source, mix clarity, or individual performances.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, negative-star review focusing on a date error; there is no information about the show’s musical merit or recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix balance, or source type were provided.
